instructions: Review entries, then set include_on_site to true. Run: python scripts/generate_html.py

vulnerabilities.title: LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin
vulnerabilities.name: LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin UNIX Symbolic Link (Symlink) Following Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: LiteSpeed cPanel plugin contains a UNIX symbolic link (Symlink) following vulnerability that could allow a user with FTP or web shell access on a shared hosting server running CloudLinux/CageFS.
vulnerabilities.short_description: LiteSpeed cPanel plugin contains a UNIX symbolic link (Symlink) following vulnerability that could allow a user with...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.

vulnerabilities.title: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager
vulnerabilities.name: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Directory or Path Traversal Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains a directory or path traversal vulnerability that could allow an authenticated, remote attacker to create a file or overwrite any file on the filesystem of an affected system.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains a directory or path traversal vulnerability that could allow an...

Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
